article_title: Update clarifies reporting of tips and gratuities in payroll

briefs.title: WorkSafeBC clarifies how tips and gratuities must be reported in assessable payroll
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC has updated its assessable payroll practice directive to clarify how tips and gratuities are treated for payroll reporting. No new obligations are created; this is a language clarification of guidance in place since 2010.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated WorkSafeBC assessable payroll directive to confirm your tip reporting practices align with the clarified guidance.
briefs.industries: Food Service, Hotel & Accommodation, Labour & Employment
briefs.article_title: Update clarifies reporting of tips and gratuities in payroll
